meanings.definition: develop and reach maturity; undergo maturation
develop and work out fully in one's mind
examples: I need to mature my thoughts

meanings.definition: cause to ripen or develop fully

examples: we age every day--what a depressing thought!

meanings.definition: cause to ripen and discharge pus
having reached full natural growth or development
fully developed or matured and ready to be eaten or used
(of birds) having developed feathers or plumage; often used in combination
